creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
It's an itch which needs to be scratched: net/rrdtool came from
net/mrtg, which was a good location for it. net/mrtg has later been
moved to net-mgmt/mrtg. net/rrdtool is "Round Robin Database Tools",
therefor it's better if it moves to databases/rrdtool. Same with
net/rrdtool10.

Fix: 

Repocopy:
		net/rrdtool	-> databases/rrdtool
		net/rrdtool10	-> databases/rrdtool10

Change CATEGORIES:
		net		-> databases graphics

Affected ports:
		databases/mysqlard
		devel/p5-RRDTool-OO
		devel/p5-SVN-Statistics
		graphics/orca
		mail/couriergraph
		mail/mailgraph
		net/cacti
		net/happystats
		net/jffnms
		net/jrobin
		net/p5-POE-Component-RRDTool
		net/p5-RRD-Simple
		net/php4-rrdtool
		net/php5-rrdtool
		net/py-rrdpipe
		net/py-rrdtool_lgpl
		net/rrdtool
		net/rrdtool10
		net/smokeping
		net-mgmt/bigsister
		net-mgmt/cricket
		net-mgmt/flowscan
		net-mgmt/ifgraph
		net-mgmt/junipoll
		net-mgmt/nagiosgraph
		net-mgmt/nagiostat
		net-mgmt/nav
		net-mgmt/nfsen
		net-mgmt/nrg
		net-mgmt/ourmon
		net-mgmt/torrus
		security/amavis-stats
		sysutils/dtc
		sysutils/dtc-toaster
		sysutils/munin-main
		sysutils/symon
		www/drraw

I volunteer to do the changes in the above mentioned ports.
